p4_objective: Design and validate next-generation hypotheses with stronger economic priors, portfolio-level testing, and new data sources.

stages.title: Data Source Expansion Audit
stages.objective: Confirm which new data sources are available, what historical depth exists, and what backfill is needed for next-gen hypothesis design.
tests_required: Missing data sources documented as DATA_SOURCE_MISSING
success_criteria: All existing tables audited with row count and date coverage
No new hypothesis designed in this stage

stages.title: Cross-Sectional Ranking Framework
stages.objective: Build universe-wide ranking system for stocks. Compute universe rank, sector rank (when available), and risk-adjusted rank from existing StockQuote data. This enables portfolio-level hypothesis testing.
tests_required: No future data in rank computation
Rank is stable given same universe
Sector rank uses available industry codes
success_criteria: Universe rank computable for all StockQuote symbols

stages.title: Market Regime Classifier
stages.objective: Build a market regime classifier from TAIEX data (trend, volatility, bull/bear/sideways). All next-gen hypotheses will be conditioned on market regime to avoid regime-blind signals.
prerequisites: P4-01 confirms MarketIndex TAIEX data coverage
tests_required: Regime labels are discrete and stable
success_criteria: At least 3 regime states defined (bull, bear, sideways)
TAIEX-based regime covers full StockQuote date range
Regime switches are not too frequent (noise filter applied)

stages.title: Portfolio-Level Backtester
stages.objective: Build a basket-level validation framework. Instead of single-stock permutation tests, validate top-N ranked baskets against random baskets. This provides higher statistical power and more realistic simulation.
success_criteria: BH-FDR correction applied across all hypotheses

stages.title: Next-Gen Hypothesis Registry
stages.objective: Design and register new hypotheses (H013+) using the quality scoring rubric. Only hypotheses scoring >=70/100 may be registered. Economic rationale required. Stronger priors required.
tests_required: No threshold adjustment from P3 results
promotion_allowed=false for all new hypotheses at registration
success_criteria: At least 3 new hypotheses registered with quality_score >= 70

stages.title: P4 Batch Validation
stages.objective: Validate new hypotheses from P4-05 using the portfolio-level backtester from P4-04. Apply two-tier BH-FDR, permutation tests, and regime-conditioned analysis.
tests_required: Human review required before any promotion
